home.heroTagline: Building Mobile Apps Used by Millions.
home.heroDescription: Senior Fullstack Mobile & Web Developer specializing in React Native architectures and Node.js backends for the financial and health sectors.
home.philosophyTitle: Clean code is the baseline; scalability and team leadership are the differentiators.
home.philosophyP1Start: With over 6 years of experience, I contribute to and lead development teams through the full lifecycle of high-impact mobile products. My approach focuses on
home.philosophyP2: I bridge the gap between technical execution and business objectives — from architecture decisions and state management to API design and team coordination — always focused on delivering solutions that hold up at scale.
home.project1Desc: React Native developer for one of Paraguay's most used fintech apps. Developing and maintaining high-quality features for a wallet platform with over 1 million active users, with a strong focus on app performance and scalability.
home.project2Desc: Contributed to the development of Conti Móvil, Paraguay's leading home banking app, and Continental Banca Empresas for corporate clients. Delivered new features and resolved front-end issues under a Scrum methodology.
home.role1Title: React Native Developer Sr. — Billetera Mango
home.role1Desc: Developing and maintaining new features for Paraguay's leading electronic wallet app. Collaborating within a Scrum team focused on high-quality UX, performance optimization, and feature scalability.
home.role1Item1: Contributing to a platform serving over 1 million active users.
home.role1Item2: Focused on app performance, code quality, and scalable architecture using React Native, TypeScript, Redux, Firebase, and Rive.
home.role2Title: React Native Developer — Banco Continental SAECA
home.role2Desc: Worked on two major banking apps: Conti Móvil (retail) and Continental Banca Empresas (corporate). Delivered features and resolved issues ensuring a seamless banking experience for hundreds of thousands of users.
home.role2Item1: Contributed to Conti Móvil, a home banking app with 450,000+ users.
home.role2Item2: Participated in continuous product improvement under Agile/Scrum methodologies.
home.role3Title: Junior & Fullstack Developer — Sercicronos / Arco SA
home.role3Desc: Started career as a Junior Developer at Sercicronos, a marathon and sports event management platform. Later joined Arco SA as a Fullstack Developer, managing and enhancing the core web system of a radiology clinic.

about.subtitle: Senior Fullstack Mobile & Web Developer
about.title: About Me
about.p1: I am a Fullstack Mobile & Web Developer with over 6 years of experience building high-performance applications used by millions of people in Paraguay. I specialize in React Native, TypeScript, and Node.js, with a proven track record in the financial sector.
about.p2: My focus is on delivering clean, scalable, and maintainable code while actively contributing to team growth. I thrive in Scrum environments, leading projects from architecture through to delivery — both as an individual contributor and as a team lead.
about.archDesc: I believe in building structures that allow teams to move fast without accumulating unsustainable technical debt. Every module should be as easy to replace as it is to build.
about.precisionDesc: Every technical choice is a business decision. I weigh library longevity, team familiarity, and performance tradeoffs before committing to an architectural direction.
about.craftDesc: Quality is non-negotiable. I advocate for clean, expressive codebases, rigorous code reviews, and a culture of continuous improvement.
about.humanDesc: Great apps are built by great teams. I focus on clear communication, well-documented APIs, and reducing cognitive load for everyone involved in the product.
about.mentoringDesc: As project lead for Farmacia Canaria, I directed a distributed team of 3 Argentinian developers while serving as the sole backend developer — translating stakeholder needs into functional, role-based modules for a telemedicine platform.
about.openSourceDesc: As the sole developer of PadelSys and the Realtec landing page, I've managed projects end-to-end: from architecture and stakeholder meetings to deployment and maintenance.
about.speakingDesc: Experienced in acting as the technical bridge between stakeholders and development teams — defining API contracts, prioritizing features, and ensuring business goals are reflected in every delivery.

experience.subtitle: Professional History
experience.title: Experience
experience.description: Over 6 years building high-impact mobile and web products in the financial, health, and sports sectors — from 450K-user banking apps to a 1M+ user fintech wallet.
experience.role1Item1: Developing and maintaining new features for an electronic wallet app with over 1 million active users.
experience.role1Item2: Collaborating within a Scrum team to deliver high-quality UX with a focus on performance and scalability.
experience.role1Item3: Working with React Native, TypeScript, Redux, Firebase, Animated, and Rive.
experience.role2Item1: Contributed to Conti Móvil, Paraguay's home banking app with 450,000+ users.
experience.role2Item2: Developed features for Continental Banca Empresas, the bank's corporate client app.
experience.role2Item3: Delivered front-end improvements and bug fixes under an Agile/Scrum methodology.
experience.role3Item1: Managed and enhanced the core web system of a radiology clinic.
experience.role3Item2: Developed modules for patient management, billing, and role-based access control.
experience.role3Item3: Tech stack: Laravel, Vue.js, Express.js, HTML5, MySQL, PHP.
experience.ctaTitle: Ready to build something that matters?
experience.ctaDesc: Open to senior mobile development roles and freelance consulting opportunities.
